title: DNA Extraction from Rectal Mucosa Biopsies for Microbiome Analysis
author: Lee Murphy

steps.title: Add 828 µL Sodium Phosphate buffer;...
steps.instruction: Add 828 µL Sodium Phosphate buffer; 122 µL MT buffer (both from MPBio Kit), 50 µL Lysozyme (100mg/ml) and 50 µL Mutanolysin (5U/μl) to the tube, briefly vortex to mix and incubate on a heat block at 37 °C for 01:00:00

steps.title: Label and weigh a 2ml Eppendorf tube
steps.instruction: Label and weigh a 2ml Eppendorf tube. Transfer rectal mucosa biopsy tissue in to the 2ml Eppendorf tube. Re-weigh to calculate weight of biopsy tissue and record. (Aim for 5-60 mg of starting tissue).

steps.title: Perform Bead Beating with the MP...
steps.instruction: Perform Bead Beating with the MP Biomedicals FastPrep-24 for 00:01:00 at 5m/s.

steps.title: Transfer entire contents of the Eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Transfer entire contents of the Eppendorf tube to a Matrix E tube (MPBio Kit).

steps.title: Incubate at 85 °C for 00:15:00 on the heating block
steps.instruction: Incubate at 85 °C for 00:15:00 on the heating block.

steps.title: Repeat steps 23 and 24
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 23 and 24 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:05:00 and transfer supernatant to a fresh 2ml Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 250 µL PPS Solution (MPBio),...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL PPS Solution (MPBio), mix by inverting tube 12 times.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:05:00 and transfer supernatant to a 15ml tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:01:00 then empty the flow through from the tube.

steps.title: Gently resuspend the Matrix in the...
steps.instruction: Gently resuspend the Matrix in the remaining solution by pipetting up and down and transfer 600 µL to a spin filter column (MPBio).

steps.title: Remove and discard 500 µL of...
steps.instruction: Remove and discard 500 µL of supernatent without disturbing the Binding Matrix at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Mix by inverting the 15ml tubes...
steps.instruction: Mix by inverting the 15ml tubes for 00:02:00 then leave standing for 00:05:00 to collect the binding matrix at the bottom of the 15ml tube.

steps.title: Repeat steps 32 and 33 if...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 32 and 33 if necessary until all the Binding Matrix solution is applied to the spin filter column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 14k for 00:01:00 to collect eluted sample
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 14k for 00:01:00 to collect eluted sample. Remove the spin column and store the DNA sample tube for QC and microbial DNA enrichment.

steps.title: Apply 80 µL DES elution buffer...
steps.instruction: Apply 80 µL DES elution buffer to the Matrix in the spin column and pipette gently up and down to resuspend the Matrix. (Heating the DES buffer on the block for 00:05:00 at 55 °C before using may make this easier).

steps.title: Air dry for 00:05:00 then transfer...
steps.instruction: Air dry for 00:05:00 then transfer the spin column to a fresh, labelled catch tube (MPBio).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:01:00 . Discard the flow through and centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00 to dry.

steps.title: Add 500 µL SEWSM wash buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL SEWSM wash buffer (MPBio) to the spin column, pipette gently until the Matrix is fully resuspended. (Ensure SEWSM buffer has 100% Ethanol added according to the kit instructions before use)

steps.title: Vortex the Binding Matrix (MPBio) before...
steps.instruction: Vortex the Binding Matrix (MPBio) before use to ensure matrix is fully resuspended and add 1 mL to the 15ml tube.

steps.title: Label and weigh a 2 mL...
steps.instruction: Label and weigh a 2 mL Matrix E tube tube (MPBio). Transfer stool (approximately 0.2 g ) and weigh to record weight of stool sample to be extracted.

steps.title: Add 928 µL Sodium Phosphate buffer;...
steps.instruction: Add 928 µL Sodium Phosphate buffer; 122 µL MT buffer (both from MPBio Kit) to the sample in the Matrix E tube.

steps.title: Perform Bead Beating with the MP...
steps.instruction: Perform Bead Beating with the MP Biomedicals FastPrep-24 for 00:01:00 at 5m/s.

steps.title: Incubate at 85 °C for 00:15:00 on the heating block
steps.instruction: Incubate at 85 °C for 00:15:00 on the heating block.

steps.title: Repeat steps 3 and 4
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 3 and 4.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:05:00 and transfer supernatant to a fresh 2ml Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 250 µL PPS Solution (MPBio),...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL PPS Solution (MPBio), mix by inverting tube 12 times.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:05:00 and transfer supernatant to a 15ml tube.

steps.title: Vortex the Binding Matrix (MPBio) before...
steps.instruction: Vortex the Binding Matrix (MPBio) before use to ensure matrix is fully resuspended and add 1 mL to the 15ml tube.

steps.title: Mix by inverting the 15ml tubes...
steps.instruction: Mix by inverting the 15ml tubes for 00:02:00 then leave standing for 00:05:00 to collect the binding matrix at the bottom of the 15ml tube.

steps.title: Remove and discard 500 µL of...
steps.instruction: Remove and discard 500 µL of supernatent without disturbing the Binding Matrix at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Gently resuspend the Matrix in the...
steps.instruction: Gently resuspend the Matrix in the remaining solution by pipetting up and down and transfer 600 µL to a spin filter column (MPBio).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:01:00 then empty the flow through from the tube.

steps.title: Repeat steps 12 and 13 if...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 12 and 13 if necessary until all the Binding Matrix solution is applied to the spin filter column.

steps.title: Add 500 µL SEWSM wash buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL SEWSM wash buffer (MPBio) to the spin column, pipette gently until the Matrix is fully resuspended. (Ensure SEWSM buffer has 100% Ethanol added according to the kit instructions before use)

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:01:00 . Discard the flow through and centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00 to dry.

steps.title: Air dry for 00:05:00 then transfer...
steps.instruction: Air dry for 00:05:00 then transfer the spin column to a fresh, labelled catch tube (MPBio).

steps.title: Apply 80 µL DES elution buffer...
steps.instruction: Apply 80 µL DES elution buffer to the Matrix in the spin column and pipette gently up and down to resuspend the Matrix. (Heating the DES buffer on the block for 00:05:00 at 55 °C before using may make this easier).

steps.title: Centrifuge 14k for 00:01:00 to collect eluted sample
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 14k for 00:01:00 to collect eluted sample. Remove the spin column and store the DNA sample tube for QC.
